actions.name: Get Case
actions.description: Get a Cydarm case by UUID

parameters.name: case_uuid
parameters.description: UUID of case to get

actions.name: Quick Search Cases
actions.description: Query Cydarm cases with a keyword filter

parameters.name: search_string
parameters.description: Search string

actions.name: Create Action Comment
actions.description: Create a plaintext comment on an action instance

parameters.name: action_instance_uuid
parameters.description: UUID of action instance

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Comment to add to action instance

actions.name: Create Case Comment
actions.description: Create a plaintext comment on a case

parameters.name: case_uuid
parameters.description: UUID of the case

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Comment text

parameters.name: acl
parameters.description: The ACL of the data object

parameters.name: assignee
parameters.description: The email address of the current assignee

parameters.name: closed
parameters.description: The time at which the case was closed. Expected format: ISO-8601

parameters.name: created
parameters.description: The time at which the case was created. Expected format: ISO-8601

parameters.name: deletable
parameters.description: Whether the data is deletable in the current context

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description

parameters.name: editable
parameters.description: Whether the data is editable in the current context

parameters.name: locator
parameters.description: The locator of the case

parameters.name: manageable
parameters.description: Whether the data is manageable in the current context

parameters.name: members
parameters.description:
UUIDs of member cases (if this case is a group).
                           Expected format: JSON Array.
                           Example: ["d9e526e8-59fc-44e3-8458-08da3269e0b0", "bd10075d-740c-4a7c-931c-c2a65843f3dc"]

parameters.name: metadata
minSlaName
parameters.description: The minimum SLA name

parameters.name: minSlaSeconds
parameters.description: The minimum SLA remaining time, in seconds

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: The name of the organisation who the case is relevant to

parameters.name: readable
parameters.description: Whether the data is readable in the current context

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: An integer 1 to 5

parameters.name: severityName
parameters.description: The severity name for the case

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: The current status of the case

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: The tags attached to this case. Expected format: JSON Array

parameters.name: totalActionsInAllPlaybooks
parameters.description: The total number of actions for all playbooks in a case

parameters.name: totalCompletedActionsInAllPlaybooks
parameters.description: The number of actions that are completed for all playbooks in a case

parameters.name: updateAcls
parameters.description: Update all ACLS for the case including data items

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: The UUID of the case
